notes: Conservative OP-first anchor ruleset for live scanning and paper trading.
Use this when you want the safest current forward-evidence entrypoint, not the broadest research coverage.
Rationale: OP_DURABLE_K7 has the largest 2024-2025 OP holdout sample among current candidates and the strongest walk-forward selection frequency.
No unsupported track aliasing is applied. BAQ is not treated as BEL.

rules.plain_english: Oaklawn Park, race 7+, 11-12 runners, favorite-second gap at least 5%, play Key-1-with-7.
